title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE STA. MARIA GENERAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF STA. MARIA, PROVINCE OF BULACAN, TO ROGACIANO M. MERCADO MEMORIAL GENERAL HOSPITAL

chunks.text:
H. No. 28537 / 88 OG No. 23, 3492 (June 8, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7402, April 14, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE STA. MARIA GENERAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF STA. MARIA, PROVINCE OF BULACAN, TO ROGACIANO M. MERCADO MEMORIAL GENERAL HOSPITAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1 The name of the Sta. Maria General Hospital in the Municipality of Sta. Maria, Province of Bulacan, is hereby changed to Rogaciano M. Mercado Memorial General Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 14, 1991 and February 3, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 14, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
